problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: Combining Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
